# VidaPulse

> Video analytics platform for coaches, course creators, educators, and digital marketers who use video to drive engagement, sales, or learning.

VidaPulse lets you track viewer engagement on any video without re-hosting it. Paste a YouTube, Amazon S3, Google Drive, Dropbox, Loom, Zoom, or direct MP4/HLS link — VidaPulse wraps it with an analytics player and delivers second-level heatmaps, unique viewer tracking, UTM attribution, device and geographic breakdowns, and a one-line embed script you drop onto any webpage.

## Core capabilities

- **Engagement heatmaps**: second-by-second view of which parts viewers watch, skip, or replay. Distinguishes first-time watches from replays.
- **Unique viewer tracking**: persistent viewer IDs across browser sessions using localStorage UUIDs — no PII collected, no cookies set by the tracker.
- **Multi-platform video support**: YouTube, Amazon S3, Google Drive, Azure Blob Storage, Dropbox, OneDrive, Loom, Zoom recordings, direct MP4 links, HLS streams.
- **Custom embed**: one `<script>` tag works on any website, CMS, or landing page builder (Kajabi, Thinkific, ClickFunnels, WordPress, Webflow, custom HTML).
- **UTM and source tracking**: automatically captures utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_term, utm_content, and document.referrer for every viewer session.
- **Geographic and device insights**: country, city, browser, OS, screen resolution — no third-party geolocation service required.
- **Viewer-level analytics**: individual viewer session history, watch patterns, and session count (Pro plan).
- **Audience segmentation and conversion tracking** (Pro plan).
- **Domain security controls**: restrict embed playback to authorised domains only.
- **Custom player controls**: enable or disable seek bar, speed controls, mute button, autoplay, click-to-play — per video.

## Pricing

- **Free forever**: 1 video. Total plays, play rate, unique visitors, domain tracking. No credit card. No expiry.
- **Starter — $10/month**: up to 10 videos. All Free features plus geographic data, device and browser breakdown, average time watched.
- **Pro — $19/month**: unlimited videos. All Starter features plus second-level engagement heatmaps, viewer-level analytics, audience segmentation, conversion tracking, events, reports, alerts, priority support.

## Target users

- **Online coaches** running video sales letters (VSLs), webinar replays, and course preview videos
- **Course creators** on Kajabi, Thinkific, Teachable, Podia, or custom platforms
- **Educators** delivering video lessons, onboarding videos, or recorded training
- **Digital marketers** running video-based sales funnels and ad campaigns
- **B2B sales teams** using personalised video demos and follow-up videos

## How it works

1. Paste any supported video URL into the VidaPulse dashboard
2. Copy the generated `<script>` embed tag
3. Paste the tag onto any webpage that shows the video
4. All viewer interactions (play, pause, seek, rewatch, exit) are captured and flow into the VidaPulse dashboard in real time

No video migration, no storage costs, no platform lock-in.

## Technical summary

- Backend: Node.js / Express on Railway.app, PostgreSQL database
- Analytics ingestion: public CORS-enabled API endpoint, responds before DB work for sendBeacon support
- Viewer identification: UUID in localStorage — no PII, no cookies set by the tracker script
- Embed tracker: vanilla JavaScript (no dependencies), ~5 KB, works with native `<video>` elements, YouTube IFrame API, and Vimeo postMessage
- Heatmap storage: second-bucket aggregation, batch upsert via PostgreSQL UNNEST
- All data stored on VidaPulse's own infrastructure — not shared with third parties

## Key pages

- Landing page: https://vidapulse.in/
- App login: https://app.vidapulse.in/login
- Pricing: https://vidapulse.in/#pricing
- Features: https://vidapulse.in/#features
- Support: support@vidapulse.in

## Frequently asked questions

**What is VidaPulse?**
VidaPulse is a video analytics SaaS that tracks viewer engagement — heatmaps, session data, viewer identity, UTM attribution — on any video hosted anywhere. You don't move your video. You add a script tag and analytics begins.

**Does VidaPulse host videos?**
No. VidaPulse never stores your video files. Your video stays on YouTube, S3, Google Drive, or wherever it already lives. VidaPulse only collects viewer interaction events.

**Is the free plan really free forever?**
Yes. The free plan has no trial period and no expiry date. It supports 1 video with basic analytics indefinitely.

**How is VidaPulse different from YouTube Analytics?**
YouTube Analytics only works for videos uploaded to YouTube and only shows aggregate data. VidaPulse works with any video source, shows second-level engagement heatmaps, identifies individual viewers across sessions, tracks UTM parameters, and embeds on your own website rather than sending viewers to YouTube.

**Who owns the viewer data?**
You do. VidaPulse stores viewer analytics data in your account. Data is not sold or shared with third parties. The embed tracker collects no personally identifiable information.
